comment: P1 identity calibration (the amp-slug class, caution C-003). The best on-page candidates are a marketing headline carrying HTML entity residue and a 'Price List' page title: the exact inputs that minted the live slugs 'luxury-aesthetic-clinic-for-radiant-skin-amp-body' and 'price-list' on the old estate. facts/identity.js must refuse both as display_name and must never derive the poisoned slugs; the honest resolution here is the domain stem at confidence 'weak'.
